articles.description: Rory McIlroy opens up a six-shot lead at the Masters - a record after 36 holes - as he sharpens his focus on securing a rare back-to-back win.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Rory McIlroy tightens grip on Masters with record 36-hole lead at Augusta

articles.description: West Ham's thumping win over Wolves not only boosts their own Premier League survival hopes, but plunges Tottenham into the drop zone - and to new depths.
articles.title: West Ham 4-0 Wolves: Hammers have fresh hope - but Tottenham in uncharted territory

articles.description: Real Madrid suffer La Liga title blow as they are held to a home draw by Girona.
articles.title: Real Madrid 1-1 Girona: Los Blancos continue stuttering form with home draw in La Liga

articles.description: Ollie Watkins speaks to Kelly Somers about Aston Villa, England and his World Cup dream.
articles.title: Ollie Watkins reveals he has spoken to Michael Owen about his 'difficult' season

articles.description: Tottenham boss Roberto de Zerbi says he is "not better" than predecessors Thomas Frank or Igor Tudor as he prepares to take charge of his first game at the Premier League strugglers.
articles.title: Tottenham: Roberto de Zerbi says he is 'not better' than Thomas Frank or Igor Tudor

articles.description: Robert MacIntyre fails to deliver on the course at the Masters - but provides one of the best known moments from this year's tournament. Or rather, one of its best gnome moments.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Scotland's Robert MacIntyre uses gnome image after exit from Augusta

articles.description: Tyson Fury says he took his undefeated record "for granted" as he appeared lean and sharp at the weigh-in for Saturday's bout with Arslanbek Makhmudov.
articles.title: Fury vs Makhmudov: British heavyweight Tyson Fury looks leans and sharp at weigh-in

articles.description: Sportswear giant Nike is investigating a design issue with the shirts set to be worn by several teams - including England - at this summer's World Cup.
articles.title: Nike investigating issue with World Cup kits including England

articles.description: Vaibhav Suryavanshi, 15, continues his astonishing run of form in the IPL as Rajasthan Royals beat Royal Challengers Bengaluru by six wickets.
articles.title: IPL 2026 results: Vaibhav Suryavanshi hits 15-ball fifty as RR beat RCB

articles.description: Bath come from 21 points down to beat Prem leaders Northampton 43-41 and reach the semi-finals of the Champions Cup in an incredible clash at the Rec.
articles.title: Champions Cup: Bath 43-41 Northampton Saints - Ted Hill try completes fightback
